Don't Leave Your Stronghold! Ammoron succeeds Amalickiah as king of the Lamanites-Moroni, Teancum, and Lehi lead the Nephites in a victorious war against the Lamanites-The city of Mulek is retaken, and Jacob the Lamanite is slain. (Alma 52 headnote). The Nephite defenses around the perimeter of the land were minimal because their forces were busy at home trying to solve internal problems caused…
